bibliography: A bibliografia depende do ciclo de conferências de cada ano letivo, sendo sugerida pelos apresentadores das sessões e pelo professor orientador em função da escolha do tema dos candidatos.
methodology:
This curricular unit promotes a wide range of interventions in the areas of the study cycle, on which expository and exploratory methods are used. After each conference the teacher responsible for the session promotes a debate, acting as a facilitator between the students, the speaker and the subject addressed, leading them to take an active approach in the thematic of the case study presented.



The evaluation is focused on the student's participation in the sessions and in the achievement of the objectives defined for the course: choice of the dissertation topic and advisor and performing an outline of its state of the art and work plan. Alternatively, candidates may be assessed by submitting one or two 'Position Papers' exploring topics covered by the conference cycle, or on their dissertation theme.
objectives:
Promote a cycle of conferences with a wide range of interventions in the scientific areas of the study cycle.

Promote contacts between candidates and organizations and personalities with relevant activity in advanced areas of data science and geographic information systems.



Develop candidates' ability to acquire and deepen knowledge from exhibitions held in a conference environment.



At the end of the course, candidates should have an up-to-date global vision of the main innovation themes in the training area (data science applied to geographic information systems), allowing them to:



- Select and consolidate the dissertation theme.

- Make contacts with a view to choosing the right supervisor for the master's thesis.

- Start the process of carrying out the master's thesis, with the preparation of the respective plan and state of the art.
organicUnit: ECATI - School of Communication, Architecture, Arts and Information Technologies
programme:
1. Opening and presentation of the seminar course.

2. Conference calendar for the academic year to be defined and elaborated.

3. Research work development (conference papers).

4. Presentation of master's thesis proposals.
presentation: The project seminar curricular unit includes the participation of students in specialized conferences, the establishment of contacts with reference professionals, and the initiation of the master's dissertation process, preparing students for the complex challenges they will encounter at the interface between data science and geographic information systems while completing the dissertation. The aim of this curricular unit is for students to consolidate the theme of the dissertation, prepare a work plan and prepare a bibliographical review to support the dissertation / project.
avaliacao:
Proposta de dissertação: 70 % (avaliação conjunta com o orientador de dissertação).

Apresentação da proposta de dissertação: 10 % (avaliação conjunta com o orientador de dissertação).

Participação em debates e discussões sobre o ciclo de conferências: 20%.
